title: Spicy Paneer Keto Kebabs
description: A keto-friendly Indian-inspired dish made with paneer, spices, and a hint of smokiness.

ingredients.name: spicy
ingredients.notes: use store-bought or homemade spice mix

instructions: Cut the paneer into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the ghee, salt, black pepper, cumin powder, coriander powder, and cayenne pepper.
Thread the paneer cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the paneer with the spice mixture, making sure they're evenly coated.
Heat a non-stick skillet or grill over medium-high heat.
Add the paneer skewers and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with a side of keto-friendly greens or a salad for a well-rounded meal.
